metar.name: Ozark/Cairns AAF, AL, US
metar.rawOb: METAR KOZR 170455Z AUTO 28004KT 10SM CLR 04/M04 A3014 RMK AO2 SLP210 T00351038

sevenDay.synopsis: Once the storms get thru today, it looks like a quiet week ahead. We'll likely see patchy IFR cigs thru the AM period, and showers/TS will rumble til around 09L. We will continue to monitor for the possibility of severe, but Moderate TS (G35kts) are most likely. Behind this front, winds will be gusty (G30kts), producing LGT-OCNL MDT TURBC (Cat II a/c) thru the AM/PM periods. Winds should ease up around 17L, but 20kt gusts are possible into the N1. The rest of the week looks VFR and NEG hazards.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 16 MAR - 22 MAR
